scripts.dev:gateway: pnpm build:shared && JWT_SECRET=change_me_super_secret CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:5173,http://127.0.0.1:5173,http://localhost:5174,http://127.0.0.1:5174,http://localhost:5175,http://127.0.0.1:5175 PORT=4100 AUTH_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:5001 STUDENT_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:5002 TEACHER_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:5003 FEES_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:5004 EXAM_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:5006 CLASS_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:5007 SUBJECT_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:5008 CUSTOM_FIELDS_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:4020 ANNOUNCEMENTS_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:4007 REQUESTS_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:4008 SETTINGS_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:4014 TEACHER_PROFILE_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:4011 TEACHER_DIARY_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:4015 TEACHER_ATTENDANCE_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:4013 TEACHER_TIMETABLE_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:4012 TEACHER_FEEDBACK_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:4016 TEACHER_NOTIFICATIONS_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:4017 TEACHER_MEETINGS_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:4018 TEACHER_ACHIEVEMENTS_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:4019 TIMETABLE_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:5010 pnpm --filter api-gateway-ts dev
scripts.dev:settings: PORT=4014 MONGO_URI=mongodb://localhost:27017/school_hub JWT_SECRET=change_me_super_secret CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:5173,http://127.0.0.1:5173,http://localhost:5174,http://127.0.0.1:5174,http://localhost:5175,http://127.0.0.1:5175 AUTH_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:5001 pnpm --filter settings-service dev
scripts.dev: NODE_ENV=development concurrently -n gateway,auth,student,teacher,fees,exam,classes,subjects,timetable,custom_fields,announcements,requests,settings,teacher_attendance,teacher_diary,teacher_timetable,teacher_profile,teacher_feedback,teacher_notifications,teacher_meetings,teacher_achievements,admin,teacher_ui,student_ui -c cyan,green,magenta,yellow,blue,white,gray,gray,gray,gray,gray,gray,gray,gray,gray,gray,gray,gray,gray,gray,gray,red,cyan,magenta "pnpm dev:gateway" "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:student" "pnpm dev:teacher" "pnpm dev:fees" "pnpm dev:exam" "pnpm dev:classes" "pnpm dev:subjects" "pnpm dev:timetable" "pnpm dev:custom-fields" "pnpm dev:announcements" "pnpm dev:requests" "pnpm dev:settings" "pnpm dev:teacher-attendance" "pnpm dev:teacher-diary" "pnpm dev:teacher-timetable" "pnpm dev:teacher-profile" "pnpm dev:teacher-feedback" "pnpm dev:teacher-notifications" "pnpm dev:teacher-meetings" "pnpm dev:teacher-achievements" "pnpm dev:admin" "pnpm dev:teacher-dashboard" "pnpm dev:student-dashboard"
scripts.build:shared: pnpm --filter @school-hub/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @school-hub/shared-utils build && pnpm --filter @school-hub/shared-middleware build
